name: iShares Gold Trust Micro
business: The iShares Gold Trust Micro is a grantor trust that holds gold bullion and issues shares representing fractional undivided beneficial interests in the trust's net assets. The trust seeks to reflect the performance of the price of gold before expenses. Shares trade on NYSE Arca under the ticker IAUM.
sellsTo: Retail investors may purchase and sell Shares through traditional brokerage accounts.
namedSuppliers: the custodian of the Trust is JPMorgan Chase Bank N.A., London Branch
the trustee of the Trust is The Bank of New York Mellon
The sponsor of the Trust is iShares Delaware Trust Sponsor LLC
